benefits.description: Lost 7.3 lbs in first week (221.7 to 214.4 lbs), then plateaued at 214.2 lbs by week 2
Experienced some appetite suppression at 1.5mg, felt it was not AS MUCH as desired, leading to dose increase to 2mg

protocol_notes: Started at 1.5mg week 1, increased to 2mg week 2. Maintaining 500-600 calorie deficit, prioritizing protein intake. Plans to try 2.5mg at end of current vial. Weighs daily in morning, fasted, after bathroom. Current vial is 30mg. Dose escalation plan: stay at 2mg, then 2.5mg to assess tolerance before deciding on long-term dose.
